shared_case_surface: memo writeback-decision cases that keep invocation fit, owner route, evidence search, memory-worthiness filtering, outcome correctness, missed-evidence risk, and privacy posture reviewable before candidate, export, route-only debt, or no-writeback output is trusted
bounded_replacement_rule: A local repo may replace the cases only if the replacement preserves the same decision-quality question, covers all six memo_writeback_decision outcomes over time or names the missing outcomes as gaps, keeps evidence refs inspectable, and still treats skipped search and missed-evidence risk as reviewable failure modes.
public_safe_requirements: raw private transcripts are not copied into the public bundle
session evidence appears as refs or sanitized handles rather than transcript truth
source refs, PR/diff/commit/review refs, memo recall refs, and local port status are visible when relevant
generic progress is not promoted into memory candidates
central aoa-memo objects are not created by the eval or the skill application
